mapper.select: SELECT MSG_TYPE_SUB_CD ,USE_YN FROM UIDBS01.MA30_SED_MSG_AGRMNT WHERE BANK_ID=#{bankId}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO UIDBS01.MA30_SED_MSG_AGRMNT X USING ( SELECT COUNT(*) COUNT FROM UIDBS01.MA30_SED_MSG_AGRMNT WHERE BANK_ID = #{userId} AND MSG_TYPE_SUB_CD = #{msgTypeSubCd} ) Y ON ( Y.COUNT > 0 AND X.BANK_ID = #{userId} AND X.MSG_TYPE_SUB_CD = #{msgTypeSubCd} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET X.USE_YN = #{useYn}, X.UPD_DT = CURRENT TIMESTAMP, X.UPD_ID = #{userId} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( X.BANK_ID, X.MSG_TYPE_SUB_CD, X.USE_YN, X.REGIST_DT, X.REGIST_ID, X.UPD_DT, X.UPD_ID ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{msgTypeSubCd}, #{useYn}, CURRENT TIMESTAMP, #{userId}, CURRENT TIMESTAMP, #{userId} )
